hook: UK crew unemployment rose as volume of film and TV releases fell 13% between 2022-2025

hook: Can everyone live a ‘good life’ without destroying the planet?

hook: Hard but lightweight ‘bio-metal’ material discovered in sea worm jaws
body: Marine bristle worms have jaws made from a mix of proteins and metal ions that may constitute a whole new kind of material, with possible applications in engineering

hook: Metallic waves on ancient Mars
body: The European Space Agency’s Mars Express has spotted a swathe of metallic-looking waves filling Mars’s large Kaiser Crater – an ancient and otherworldly dune field sculpted by wind.
